main.description: Get a song by its uri, MusicBrainz ID, or ISRC

uri.description: The AT-URI of the song to retrieve

mbid.description: The MusicBrainz ID of the song to retrieve

isrc.description: The International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) of the song to retrieve

spotifyId.description: The Spotify track ID of the song to retrieve (resolved internally to the Spotify track URL)
